purpose: Turn Fetch research preparation into auditable live source retrieval, freshness policy, and innovation-candidate handoff before Thinking orchestration.

thinkingGate.readyWhen: All route-changing current facts are fetched live or explicitly blocked with a return stage; stale evidence returns to Fetch before orchestration.
mustNotDo: Do not treat research preparation as live source evidence.
Do not enter Thinking with stale current-fact evidence.
Do not create a long-term capability when an innovation candidate is only a sandbox proposal.
Do not write canonical files without Warden approval.

aiReadableProductStandard.passSignal: A reviewer can tell which source was fetched, when it was fetched, whether it is fresh enough, how it changes orchestration, and what happens when all existing capabilities are insufficient.
aiReadableProductStandard.failSignal: The report only says research planned, hides stale evidence, treats every gap as a skill, or writes a durable capability without approval.
